markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review initial content drafts and refine the content calendar strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Draft Feedback:** Combine the conversational tone of `Tone 2` with the conciseness of `Tone 1`. The AI narrative must be nuanced, acknowledging an iterative workflow that supports both technical and non-technical users, rather than presenting a binary "no SQL" view.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Calendar Strategy:** Prioritize AI-forward topics (e.g., "context engineering") to reinforce Hex's AI leadership. De-prioritize BI-focused articles until mid-January, when the "Context Studio" launch will provide a stronger, more defined narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [**Review Process:** Broaden the review panel for calibration drafts to include technical experts (e.g., Rachel) and leadership (Charles). This accelerates GrowthX's learning and ensures early alignment, preventing future rework.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Website Placement:** Publish SEO content to be indexed by Google but not featured on the main blog feed. This keeps the homepage focused on editorial content while allowing SEO articles to live under a "Further Reading" tag.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration Draft Review

  - [**Draft Versions:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [`Tone 1`: Strict adherence to Notion writing guidelines → felt "dry" and "start-and-stop."](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
      - [`Tone 2`: More conversational, inspired by the Hex blog → felt "dense."](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Tone & Style:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Decision:** Combine the conversational style of `Tone 2` with the conciseness of `Tone 1`.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Action:** Add more color and "show-not-tell" examples (e.g., quote a sample AI answer) to make technical concepts more engaging.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**AI Narrative:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**Problem:** The draft’s "no SQL" framing is too binary and restrictive.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**Solution:** The narrative must be nuanced, acknowledging an iterative workflow where AI generates SQL and charts, and technical users can still read and interpret the underlying code.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach supports Hex's broad user base, from non-technical self-analysts to accelerating data scientists, without alienating either group.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [**Action:** Add this nuanced AI philosophy to the writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [**Competitor Comparison Table:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [**Problem:** The table is ineffective because it doesn't clearly differentiate tools based on their AI capabilities, which is the article's core topic.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [**Action:** Reframe the table to highlight each platform's specific AI approach, maturity, and limitations.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)

### Content Calendar Strategy

  - [**AI & Context Engineering:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Priority:** Increase the number of topics focused on "context engineering" and other AI analytics keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This reinforces Hex's leadership in the AI analytics space.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [**BI Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
      - [**Problem:** Hex's BI positioning is still evolving (e.g., "redefine BI" vs. "replace BI").](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [**Decision:** De-prioritize BI-focused articles until mid-January.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The "Context Studio" launch in January will provide a stronger, more defined narrative, preventing the need for costly rework on articles published now.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
      - [**Action:** Use a few BI-leaning drafts as internal "stress tests" to help define the positioning, clearly marking them as non-publishable drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [**Competitor Article Titles:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Problem:** AI-generated titles (e.g., "unified analytics") don't always reflect Hex's current positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Solution:** Titles are a starting point; GrowthX will revise them to align with Hex's current strategic focus on AI.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)

### Website Placement for SEO Content

  - [**Decision:** SEO content will be indexed by Google but not featured on the main blog homepage.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This keeps the homepage focused on editorial content while allowing SEO articles to live under a "Further Reading" tag.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [**Action:** Confirm with Adam that this technical setup is feasible.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)
      - [Incorporate feedback into the draft: combine tones, add nuance to the AI narrative, and reframe the competitor table.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=2097.0)
      - [Find and add more AI-forward topics to the content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [Draft two new articles for next week: one competitor comparison and one BI-leaning "stress test" draft.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
  - [**Hex:**](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [Circulate the calibration draft to Charles and Rachel for review.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [Confirm with Adam the technical feasibility of the website placement strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-7xXEQY14-HHV6Lqv7y4HDjzkzcGRU93?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
